proof: function(x0: Set[Pair[X, Y]]) { not c(x0) or is_open_in_product[X, Y](x0) }(s)
let w0: Set[Pair[X, Y]] satisfy { c(w0) and not generated_open[Pair[X, Y]](b, w0) }
function(x0: Set[Pair[X, Y]]) { not c(x0) or generated_open[Pair[X, Y]](b, x0) }(w0)
let w0: Set[Pair[X, Y]] satisfy { c(w0) and not is_open_in_product[X, Y](w0) }
function(x0: Set[Pair[X, Y]]) { not c(x0) or is_open_in_product[X, Y](x0) }(w0)

goal: forall(x0: Set[Pair[X, Y]] -> Bool) { forall(x1: Set[Pair[X, Y]]) { x0(x1) implies is_open_in_product[X, Y](x1) } implies is_open_in_product[X, Y](big_union[Pair[X, Y]](x0)) }
proof: let w0: Set[Pair[X, Y]] -> Bool satisfy { forall(x0: Set[Pair[X, Y]]) { not w0(x0) or is_open_in_product[X, Y](x0) } and not is_open_in_product[X, Y](big_union[Pair[X, Y]](w0)) }

function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[Pair[T0, T1]] -> Bool) { not forall(x1: Set[Pair[T0, T1]]) { not x0(x1) or is_open_in_product[T0, T1](x1) } or is_open_in_product[T0, T1](big_union[Pair[T0, T1]](x0)) }[X, Y](w0)
function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace] { is_open_in_product[T0, T1](Set.empty_set[Pair[T0, T1]]) }[X, Y]

goal: forall(x0: Set[Pair[X, Y]], x1: Set[Pair[X, Y]]) { is_open_in_product[X, Y](x0) and is_open_in_product[X, Y](x1) implies is_open_in_product[X, Y](x0.intersection(x1)) }
proof: let w0: Set[Pair[X, Y]] satisfy { exists(k0: Set[Pair[X, Y]]) { is_open_in_product[X, Y](w0) and is_open_in_product[X, Y](k0) and not is_open_in_product[X, Y](w0 ∩ k0) } }
let w1: Set[Pair[X, Y]] satisfy { is_open_in_product[X, Y](w0) and is_open_in_product[X, Y](w1) and not is_open_in_product[X, Y](w0 ∩ w1) }
let w2: Set[Pair[X, Y]] satisfy { is_open_in_product[X, Y](w0) and is_open_in_product[X, Y](w2) and not is_open_in_product[X, Y](w0 ∩ w2) }

function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[Pair[T0, T1]], x1: Set[Pair[T0, T1]]) { not is_open_in_product[T0, T1](x0) or not is_open_in_product[T0, T1](x1) or is_open_in_product[T0, T1](x0 ∩ x1) }[X, Y](w0, w2)
function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace] { is_open_in_product[T0, T1](Set.universal_set[Pair[T0, T1]]) }[X, Y]
function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[Pair[T0, T1]]) { TopologicalSpace.is_open[Pair[T0, T1]](x0) = is_open_in_product[T0, T1](x0) }[X, Y](s)
